tagline: Account level Genie One is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: Account level Genie One is now available in Beta. Users can now discover and interact with AI/BI dashboards, Genie Spaces, and Databricks Apps from all workspaces in their account from a single entry point. Account level Genie One provides a unified homepage, cross workspace search, and recommendations and favorites across workspaces.
why_it_matters: Genie One enables users to: View and interact with AI/BI dashboards to track key performance indicators (KPIs) and analyze metrics.
key_takeaway: Account level Genie One is now available in Beta.
